name: NPC Enhancements
author: DM System Core
description: Structured NPC relationships, faction tagging, auto-extraction from session logs, and first-encounter prompts. Keeps npcs.json populated and connected.
features: Bidirectional NPC-to-NPC relationship tracking (ally, enemy, mentor, rival, etc.)
Faction/group tagging with filtered member listing
Auto-extraction of new NPC names from session log text
Relationship and faction display in narrative summary and DM context

commands.dm-npc.sh relations <name>: Show all relationships for an NPC
commands.dm-npc.sh faction-members <faction>: List all NPCs in a faction

architecture: Middleware hooks into dm-npc.sh for relationship/faction CLI commands, dm-session.sh post-hooks for auto-extraction and first-encounter prompts on session end/save.
